## ⚡ You're 10 seconds away from your Quickdraw badge!

👉 **Just click the "Close issue" button below within the next 5 minutes.**

That's the whole task. Closing an issue you opened within 5 minutes earns the
**Quickdraw ⚡** achievement on your GitHub profile.

- [ ] I opened this issue
- [ ] I'm about to close it (do it now! ⏱️)

Once closed, check your profile → **Achievements** panel. 🏆

> ⭐ If this helped, consider starring the repo so others can find it too!
